afterFileEdit.description: Tras editar archivos, corre npm test si existe package.json

sessionEnd.description: Antes de cerrar sesión, fuerza ./init.sh completo

beforeReadFile.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=(j.path||j.file||'').toLowerCase();if(/\.(env|pem|key)$/.test(p)||p.endsWith('.env')){console.error('[harness] WARN: sensitive file');process.exit(1)}}catch{}})"
beforeReadFile.description: Warn on sensitive file reads (.env, keys)
